texto: Yeah, I said the universe. Call it Fate or The Force or whatever you want. Everything is everything. It's all part of one big system. I like to think of it as the universe.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Angie Smibert: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Yeah, I said the universe. Call it Fate or The Force or whatever you want. Everything is everythi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, everything, universe pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de universe.

frase_original: Yeah, I said the universe. Call it Fate or The Force or whatever you want. Everything is everything. It's all part of one big system. I like to think of it as the universe.
